message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor black
  LifeLineBorderColor black
  LifeLineBackgroundColor white
}

actor "User" as User
participant "Application" as App
participant "<<engine>>\nAuto SDK Engine" as Engine
participant "<<avs>>\nAlexa" as Alexa

box "Activating Trial" #white
  note right of App: clicks `Activate Trial` button\non screen to activate\ntrial up-sell.
  App ->> Engine: Publish SendConnectivityEvent message specifying ACTIVATE_TRIAL event
end box

box "Activating Paid Plan" #white
  note right of App: clicks `Activate Paid Plan` button\non screen to activate\npaid plan up-sell.
  App ->> Engine: Publish SendConnectivityEvent message specifying ACTIVATE_PAID_PLAN event
end box

activate Engine
Engine ->> Alexa: InitiateDataPlanSubscription event

alt "Successful in sending event to Alexa"
  Engine --> App: Receive SendConnectivityEventReply message with SUCCESS status
else "on failure"
  Engine --> App: Receive SendConnectivityEventReply message with FAIL status
end

deactivate Engine

@enduml
```
